intro: Corynabutilon × suntense, also known as Sutherlandia, is a plant species native to southern Africa, commonly used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Sutherlandia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions such as cancer, HIV/AIDS, and cardiovascular diseases. The bioactive constituents of Sutherlandia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
